narrative:
Fairfield (precinct in Washington County) has 743 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.8 percentage points.
